question_html: You are ____ Humayun Ahmed I see.

‘______ people know the truth about his past.’ –

Which determiner can be used to fill the gap?
Choose the correct sentence:
options_html: He was completely finished with his work.
He was finished with his work.
He was totally finished with his work.
He was finished up completely with his work.
correct_answer_html: He was finished with his work.

question_html: In the word ‘Pseudonym’, the prefix, ‘Pseudo’ refers to-

Find out the perfect match for the pair.

Doctor : Hospital :: Teacher : ?

options_html: The movie was funny, entertaining, and had excitement.
The movie was funny, entertaining, and exciting.
The movie was funny, entertaining, and to excite.
The movie was funny, entertaining, and was full of excitement.
correct_answer_html: The movie was funny, entertaining, and exciting.
